tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py ...........FF........ [100%]
=================================== FAILURES =================================== ____________ test_teleport_script_mode_with_sync_includes_gt_submit ____________
def test_teleport_script_mode_with_sync_includes_gt_submit() -> None: """Test teleport --script --sync includes gt submit in activation script.
When teleporting with --script and --sync, the activation script should contain 'gt submit --no-interactive' as a post-cd command. """ runner = CliRunner() with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: env.setup_repo_structure() pr = _make_pr_details(200, "feature-sync") github = FakeLocalGitHub(pr_details={200: pr}) git = FakeGit( git_common_dirs={env.cwd: env.git_dir}, default_branches={env.cwd: "main"}, trunk_branches={env.cwd: "main"}, local_branches={env.cwd: ["main", "feature-sync"]},
... [58 lines omitted] ...
E AssertionError: assert '' != '' tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py:386: AssertionError E AssertionError: assert '' != '' tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py:415: AssertionError FAILED tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py::test_teleport_script_mode_with_sync_includes_gt_submit - AssertionError: assert '' != '' FAILED tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py::test_teleport_script_mode_without_sync_omits_gt_submit - AssertionError: assert '' != '' ========================= 2 failed, 19 passed in 0.72s =========================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 2 issues found
**Summary:** 2 test failures, 19 tests passed
**Failures:**
1. `tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py::test_teleport_script_mode_with_sync_includes_gt_submit` (line 386) - AssertionError: Script output is empty when it should contain content - Expected: `script_content.strip() != ""` - Got: empty string
2. `tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py::test_teleport_script_mode_without_sync_omits_gt_submit` (line 415) - AssertionError: Script output is empty when it should contain content - Expected: `script_content.strip() != ""` - Got: empty string
Both failures are related to `--script` mode producing empty output instead of the expected activation script content.
